Description.SourceString:
My people have a tradition that is sacred above all others; the right of challenge. There is nothing we respect more than strength or cunning. When one defeats a challenger, they prove themselves rightful of their position. When one fails, they prove themselves inadequate. 

Even gods must acknowledge this truth. 

The High Queen, lady Lougrim, earned her place by challenging the kings of old. Taking on all of them in one mythical battle and emerging the victor. In the centuries that have followed, she has held her position and bested all challengers that think themselves her rival. 

That winning streak ended today when the dragon queen took the throne. 

The battle was swift and bloody; their clashing energies created cracks in the very earth. The entire continent buckled beneath their fury, but only one of them could prevail. Her many heads tore the goddess limb from limb, swallowing down the pieces of her divine flesh until nothing of the old queen remained. 

Now we have a new queen, and long may she reign. 

Hail to High Queen Kuldra, the god eater.
